records.ety: [L. repositus, p. p. of reponere to put back; pref. re- re- + ponere to put. See Position.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Reposited; p. pr. & vb. n. Repositing.]

defs: To cause to rest or stay; to lay away; to lodge, as for safety or preservation; to place; to store.
quotes: Others reposit their young in holes.
